title: Unique Velvety Syrian Oatmeal Wrap
description: A light and briny Syrian dish featuring oatmeal, wrapped in leaves and steamed to perfection, with ayurvedic tamasic friendly ingredients. This dish is perfect for a healthy breakfast or snack.
instructions: Rinse the grape leaves and blanch them in boiling water for 30 seconds to make them pliable.
In a medium saucepan, bring the water to a boil, then add the oats, salt, and olive oil, and cook, stirring occasionally, until the oats have absorbed most of the water and have a creamy consistency.
Stir in the sumac and pomegranate molasses.
Lay a grape leaf flat on a work surface, with the stem end facing you, and place about 1/2 cup of the oat mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the stem end over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll the leaf into a neat package.
Repeat with the remaining grape leaves and oat mixture.
Place the wrapped oatmeal packages in a steamer basket, leaving some space between each package to allow for steam to pass through.
Steam the packages over boiling water for 10-12 minutes, or until the oats are cooked through and the grape leaves are tender.
Serve the wrapped oatmeal packages hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley.
